items.name: Bejeweled Sword of Great Fury
items.description: Do you see red or blue?  This fierce sword lets you switch between Ruby and Sapphire attacks.  In Ruby mode you deal 40 damage per hit, but take 15 damage yourself. In Sapphire mode you do 15 damage per hit, but can strike at a great speed, and heal yourself with each hit you land.

items.name: The Modern Top Hat
items.description: The Modern Top Hat is a stylish accessory that seamlessly blends traditional sophistication with contemporary flair. Crafted from high-quality materials, its sleek design features a streamlined silhouette and a subtle yet eye-catching embellishment. Whether worn for formal occasions or as a fashion statement, this timeless piece elevates any ensemble, making a bold and refined statement in modern fashion.
